sections.paragraph:
βολίς, ίδος, ἡ (s. βολίζω) missile, arrow, javelin (Zech 9:14; Plut., Demetr. 890 [3, 2]; Hesych.; Suda) Hb 12:20 v.l. (Ex 19:13).—DELG s.v. βάλλω p. 162.

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

Demetr Demetr , III b.c.—List 5

Hesych Hesych , V a.d.—List 5

Suda Suda = a lexical work (freq. cited as Suidas in handbooks); X a.d.—List 5

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 180
